title: Fix Incorrect URL Generated from ERD Launch Button
story: As a DataTools Pro user clicking the launch button on an ERD entity, I want to be taken to the correct object detail URL, so that I can view the dictionary page without encountering broken links.
description:
## Bug
The ERD launch button generates an incorrect URL after the Laravel migration. Clicking the launch icon on an entity node navigates to a query-parameter-style URL instead of the new RESTful route.

## Reproduction
1. Open the ERD
2. Click the launch button on any entity (e.g., Account)
3. Observe: navigates to `/object?object=Account&view=migration`
4. Expected: should navigate to `/object/Account?view=dictionary`

## Fix
Update the URL generation logic in the ERD to produce the correct Laravel-style RESTful route format.
acceptance_criteria: Old query-parameter URL format is no longer generated
All entity nodes produce correct URLs
ux_changes: Fixed ERD launch button URL generation to use the correct Laravel RESTful route format (/object/{name}?view=dictionary).
implementation_notes: URL template in the GoJS node click handler updated from query-parameter format to RESTful path format after Laravel migration.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the fix was applied.
